system_preparation.intent: Build MD-ready system artifacts when the chemistry is supported, and refuse unsafe parameterization with structured guardrails when it is not.

engine_reliability.intent: Run, save, reload, and continue short MD simulations while preserving finite energies and trajectory integrity.

scientific_answer.intent: Answer mutation or binding-effect questions against held-back experimental direction with calibrated confidence and limitations.

evidence_communication.intent: Package figures, metrics, captions, Methods text, provenance, and limitations so the result is auditable.

notes: v1.0 ground-up rebuild of MDAgentBench. Replaces v0.1 pilot.
Prompt-only tasks name public sources; ground truth is held in <task>/truth/ (scorer-only).
Scored through the repository benchmark CLI; agents may use any MD backend that emits the submission contract.
